Body.Content:
Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows now supports human interpreter listening mode in meetings where organizers enable language interpretation in Meeting options, allowing room participants to select a language and hear interpreter audio.

GA date: July CY2026
Body.Markdown:
Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows now supports human interpreter listening mode in meetings where organizers enable language interpretation in Meeting options, allowing room participants to select a language and hear interpreter audio.

GA date: July CY2026
